trivia_bullets.text: Three printings: Theros (THS, first print 2013-09-27), Theros Beyond Death (2020-01-24), Commander Legends (CMR, 2020-11-20). Functional reprint of the Act of Treason effect plus Scry 1.
sources: Scryfall: all prints via oracle_id search

trivia_bullets.text: "Mogis can fan a small flame of resentment into an inferno of madness." No attributed speaker — framed as received lore-wisdom. Mogis is the twin of Iroas and god of slaughter; fanning mortal conflict and discord is his specific divine domain.
sources: MTG Wiki: Mogis via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Hipsters of the Coast common review grade F: 'either wins games or sits in sideboard.' Devastating in sacrifice-themed decks (steal + sacrifice); mediocre in fair decks. Legal in Pauper and Pauper Commander.
sources: Hipsters of the Coast: THB Common Review 2020-01

trivia_bullets.text: THB printing by Greg Staples, veteran MTG illustrator since the Tempest-era whose sharp-contrast battle scenes span many sets.

related_cards.name: Mogis, God of Slaughter
related_cards.note: The deity named in this card's flavor text

related_cards.name: Act of Treason
related_cards.note: Closest functional analog, one mana cheaper, no Scry

related_cards.name: Skophos Warleader
related_cards.note: Sacrifice outlet that synergizes with stolen creatures
